words.example: I eat an apple every day.
Corn on the cob is yummy.
I ride my bike to school.
My cousin and I play together.
Use an eraser to fix mistakes.
My classmate sits next to me.

words.example_cn: 今天的课是关于动物的。
我最喜欢的科目是美术。

words.example: Look it up in the dictionary.
The sun rises in the east.
Wear a hat in the sun.
Wrap the scarf around your neck.
Rest your head on the pillow.
Food stays fresh in the refrigerator.
Clean the floor with a vacuum cleaner.
I sleep with my teddy bear.
The yo-yo goes up and down.
Hit the ball with a bat.
Hit the volleyball over the net.
The pizza slice is a triangle.
The cat is in the box.
The book is on the table.
The dog is under the table.
The plane is above the clouds.
The fish is below the surface.
The school is near my home.
We buy food at the supermarket.
Watch a movie at the cinema.
Watch a play at the theater.
Wipe your mouth with a napkin.
Watch TV in the living room.
Take a bath in the bathroom.
Park the car in the garage.
There are seven days in a week.
History tells us about the past.
Blow your nose with a tissue.
The elephant is big, the mouse is small.
Summer is hot, winter is cold.
The car is fast, the turtle is slow.
The giraffe is tall, the mouse is short.
The door is open, not closed.
I have a new toy, not old.
Turn on the light, it's dark.
The glass is full, not empty.
The lion is strong, the mouse is weak.
Some people are rich, some are poor.
Day is bright, night is dark.
The sun is for day, the moon is for night.
words.example_cn: 太阳是白天，月亮是夜晚。
